ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلصَّـٰٓفَّـٰتِ صَفًّا ١
ayahs.translation: By those [angels] lined up in rows

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱلزَّٲجِرَٲتِ زَجْرًا ٢
ayahs.translation: And those who drive [the clouds]

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱلتَّـٰلِيَـٰتِ ذِكْرًا ٣
ayahs.translation: And those who recite the message,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ إِلَـٰهَكُمْ لَوَٲحِدٌ ٤
ayahs.translation: Indeed, your God is One,

ayahs.textUthmani: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَرَبُّ ٱلْمَشَـٰرِقِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٲتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَرَبُّ ٱلْمَشَـٰرِقِ ٥
ayahs.textIndopak: رَبُّ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا وَرَبُّ الۡمَشَارِقِ ؕ‏
ayahs.translation: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them and Lord of the sunrises.
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbus samaawaati wal-ardi Wa-maa bainahumaa Wa-Rabbul mashaariq

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنْيَا بِزِينَةٍ ٱلْكَوَاكِبِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنْيَا بِزِينَةٍ ٱلْكَوَاكِبِ ٦
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّا زَيَّنَّا السَّمَآءَ الدُّنۡيَا بِزِيۡنَةِ اۨلۡكَوَاكِبِۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We have adorned the nearest heaven with an adornment of stars

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَحِفْظًا مِّن كُلِّ شَيْطَـٰنٍ مَّارِدٍ ٧
ayahs.translation: And as protection against every rebellious devil

ayahs.textUthmani: لَّا يَسَّمَّعُونَ إِلَى ٱلْمَلَإِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ وَيُقْذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَّا يَسَّمَّعُونَ إِلَى ٱلْمَلَإِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ وَيُقْذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٍ ٨
ayahs.textIndopak: لَّا يَسَّمَّعُوۡنَ اِلَى الۡمَلَاِ الۡاَعۡلٰى وَيُقۡذَفُوۡنَ مِنۡ كُلِّ جَانِبٍۖ ‏
ayahs.translation: [So] they may not listen to the exalted assembly [of angels] and are pelted from every side,
ayahs.transliteration: Laa yassamma-'oona ilal mala-'il a'alaa Wa-yuqthafoona min kulli jaanib

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: دُحُورًا‌ۖ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ وَاصِبٌ ٩
ayahs.translation: Repelled; and for them is a constant punishment,

ayahs.textUthmani: إِلَّا مَنْ خَطِفَ ٱلْخَطْفَةَ فَأَتْبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٌ ثَاقِبٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَّا مَنْ خَطِفَ ٱلْخَطْفَةَ فَأَتْبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٌ ثَاقِبٌ ١٠
ayahs.textIndopak: اِلَّا مَنۡ خَطِفَ الۡخَطۡفَةَ فَاَتۡبَعَهٗ شِهَابٌ ثَاقِبٌ‏
ayahs.translation: Except one who snatches [some words] by theft, but they are pursued by a burning flame, piercing [in brightness].
ayahs.transliteration: Illaa man khatifal khatfata fa-atba'ahoo shihaabun saaqib

ayahs.textUthmani: فَٱسْتَفْتِهِمْ أَهُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَم مَّنْ خَلَقْنَآ ۚ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُم مِّن طِينٍ لَّازِبٍۭ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱسْتَفْتِهِمْ أَهُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَم مَّنْ خَلَقْنَآ‌ۚ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُم مِّن طِينٍ لَّازِبِۭ ١١
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاسۡتَفۡتِهِمۡ اَهُمۡ اَشَدُّ خَلۡقًا اَمۡ مَّنۡ خَلَقۡنَاؕ اِنَّا خَلَقۡنٰهُمۡ مِّنۡ طِيۡنٍ لَّازِبٍ‏
ayahs.translation: Then inquire of them, [O Muḥammad], "Are they a stronger [or more difficult] creation or those [others] We have created?" Indeed, We created them [i.e., men] from sticky clay.
ayahs.transliteration: Fastaftihim ahum ashaddu khalqan am man khalaqnaa; innaa khalaqnaahum min teenil laazib

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بَلْ عَجِبْتَ وَيَسْخَرُونَ ١٢
ayahs.translation: But you wonder, while they mock,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا ذُكِّرُواْ لَا يَذْكُرُونَ ١٣
ayahs.translation: And when they are reminded, they remember not.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا رَأَوْاْ ءَايَةً يَسْتَسْخِرُونَ ١٤
ayahs.translation: And when they see a sign, they ridicule.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَقَالُوٓاْ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ ١٥
ayahs.textIndopak: وَقَالُوۡۤا اِنۡ هٰذَاۤ اِلَّا سِحۡرٌ مُّبِيۡنٌ​ ۖ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And say, "This is not but obvious magic.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-qaalooo in haathaa illaa sihrum mubeen

ayahs.textUthmani: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ ١٦
ayahs.textIndopak: ءَاِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُـنَّا تُرَابًا وَّعِظَامًا ءَاِنَّا لَمَبۡعُوۡثُوۡنَۙ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: When we have died and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?
ayahs.transliteration: A-ithaa mitnaa Wa-kunnaa turaabanw Wa-'izaaman 'a-innaa lamab'oosoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ ١٧
ayahs.translation: And our forefathers [as well]?"

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قُلْ نَعَمْ وَأَنتُمْ دَٲخِرُونَ ١٨
ayahs.translation: Say, "Yes, and you will be [rendered] contemptible."

ayahs.textUthmani: فَإِنَّمَا هِىَ زَجْرَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ فَإِذَا هُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِنَّمَا هِىَ زَجْرَةٌ وَٲحِدَةٌ فَإِذَا هُمْ يَنظُرُونَ ١٩
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاِنَّمَا هِىَ زَجۡرَةٌ وَّاحِدَةٌ فَاِذَا هُمۡ يَنۡظُرُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: It will be only one shout, and at once they will be observing.
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-innamaa hiya zajra-tunw waahidatun fa-ithaa hum yanzuroon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَقَالُواْ يَـٰوَيْلَنَا هَـٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ ٢٠
ayahs.translation: They will say, "O woe to us! This is the Day of Recompense."

ayahs.textUthmani: هَـٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلْفَصْلِ ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: هَـٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلْفَصْلِ ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ ٢١
ayahs.textIndopak: هٰذَا يَوۡمُ الۡفَصۡلِ الَّذِىۡ كُنۡتُمۡ بِهٖ تُكَذِّبُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: [They will be told], "This is the Day of Judgement which you used to deny."
ayahs.transliteration: Haathaa Yawmul Faslil lathee kuntum bihee tukathiboon

ayahs.textUthmani: ۞ ٱحْشُرُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ وَأَزْوَٰجَهُمْ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْبُدُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ۞ ٱحْشُرُواْ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ وَأَزْوَٲجَهُمْ وَمَا كَانُواْ يَعْبُدُونَ ٢٢
ayahs.textIndopak: اُحۡشُرُوا الَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡا وَاَزۡوَاجَهُمۡ وَمَا كَانُوۡا يَعۡبُدُوۡنَۙ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: [The angels will be ordered], "Gather those who committed wrong, their kinds, and what they used to worship
ayahs.transliteration: Uhshurul latheena zalamoo Wa-azwaajahum Wa-maa kaanoo ya'budoon

ayahs.textUthmani: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ فَٱهْدُوهُمْ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ فَٱهْدُوهُمْ إِلَىٰ صِرَٲطِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ ٢٣
ayahs.textIndopak: مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِ فَاهۡدُوۡهُمۡ اِلٰى صِرَاطِ الۡجَحِيۡمِ‏
ayahs.translation: Other than Allāh, and guide them to the path of Hellfire
ayahs.transliteration: Min doonil laahi fahdoohum ilaa siraatil Jaheem

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَقِفُوهُمْ‌ۖ إِنَّهُم مَّسْــُٔولُونَ ٢٤
ayahs.translation: And stop them; indeed, they are to be questioned."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَا لَكُمْ لَا تَنَاصَرُونَ ٢٥
ayahs.translation: [They will be asked], "What is [wrong] with you? Why do you not help each other?"

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بَلْ هُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ مُسْتَسْلِمُونَ ٢٦
ayahs.translation: But they, that Day, are in surrender.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ ٢٧
ayahs.translation: And they will approach one another asking [i.e., blaming] each other.

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ تَأْتُونَنَا عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ تَأْتُونَنَا عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ ٢٨
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالُوۡۤا اِنَّكُمۡ كُنۡتُمۡ تَاۡتُوۡنَنَا عَنِ الۡيَمِيۡنِ‏
ayahs.translation: They will say, "Indeed, you used to come at us from the right."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُواْ بَل لَّمْ تَكُونُواْ مُؤْمِنِينَ ٢٩
ayahs.translation: They [i.e., the oppressors] will say, "Rather, you [yourselves] were not believers,

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَا كَانَ لَنَا عَلَيْكُم مِّن سُلْطَـٰنٍۭ ۖ بَلْ كُنتُمْ قَوْمًا طَـٰغِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا كَانَ لَنَا عَلَيْكُم مِّن سُلْطَـٰنِۭ‌ۖ بَلْ كُنتُمْ قَوْمًا طَـٰغِينَ ٣٠
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَا كَانَ لَنَا عَلَيۡكُمۡ مِّنۡ سُلۡطٰنِ​ۚ بَلۡ كُنۡتُمۡ قَوۡمًا طٰغِيۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And we had over you no authority, but you were a transgressing people.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maa kaana lanaa 'alaikum min sultaanim bal kuntum qawman taagheen

ayahs.textUthmani: فَحَقَّ عَلَيْنَا قَوْلُ رَبِّنَآ ۖ إِنَّا لَذَآئِقُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَحَقَّ عَلَيْنَا قَوْلُ رَبِّنَآ‌ۖ إِنَّا لَذَآئِقُونَ ٣١
ayahs.textIndopak: فَحَقَّ عَلَيۡنَا قَوۡلُ رَبِّنَآ ۖ اِنَّا لَذَآٮِٕقُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: So the word [i.e., decree] of our Lord has come into effect upon us; indeed, we will taste [punishment].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَغْوَيْنَـٰكُمْ إِنَّا كُنَّا غَـٰوِينَ ٣٢
ayahs.translation: And we led you to deviation; indeed, we were deviators."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِنَّهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ مُشْتَرِكُونَ ٣٣
ayahs.translation: So indeed they, that Day, will be sharing in the punishment.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّا كَذَٲلِكَ نَفْعَلُ بِٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ ٣٤
ayahs.translation: Indeed, that is how We deal with the criminals.

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوٓا۟ إِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوٓاْ إِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ ٣٥
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡۤا اِذَا قِيۡلَ لَهُمۡ لَاۤ اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللّٰهُۙ يَسۡتَكۡبِرُوۡنَۙ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Indeed they, when it was said to them, "There is no deity but Allāh," were arrogant
ayahs.transliteration: Innahum kaanooo ithaa qeela lahum laaa ilaaha illal laahu yastakbiroon

ayahs.textUthmani: وَيَقُولُونَ أَئِنَّا لَتَارِكُوٓا۟ ءَالِهَتِنَا لِشَاعِرٍ مَّجْنُونٍۭ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَيَقُولُونَ أَئِنَّا لَتَارِكُوٓاْ ءَالِهَتِنَا لِشَاعِرٍ مَّجْنُونِۭ ٣٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ اَٮِٕنَّا لَتٰرِكُوۡۤا اٰلِهَـتِنَا لِشَاعِرٍ مَّجۡـنُوۡنٍ ؕ‏
ayahs.translation: And were saying, "Are we to leave our gods for a mad poet?"
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-yaqooloona a'innaa lataarikooo aalihatinaa lishaa'irim majnoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بَلْ جَآءَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَصَدَّقَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ ٣٧
ayahs.translation: Rather, he [i.e., the Prophet (ﷺ)] has come with the truth and confirmed the [previous] messengers.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّكُمْ لَذَآئِقُواْ ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلْأَلِيمِ ٣٨
ayahs.translation: Indeed, you [disbelievers] will be tasters of the painful punishment,

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ ٣٩
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَا تُجۡزَوۡنَ اِلَّا مَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do -
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maa tujzawna illaa maa kuntum ta'maloon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ ٤٠
ayahs.translation: But not the chosen servants of Allāh.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ لَهُمْ رِزْقٌ مَّعْلُومٌ ٤١
ayahs.translation: Those will have a provision determined -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَوَٲكِهُ‌ۖ وَهُم مُّكْرَمُونَ ٤٢
ayahs.translation: Fruits; and they will be honored

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فِى جَنَّـٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ ٤٣
ayahs.translation: In gardens of pleasure

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مُّتَقَـٰبِلِينَ ٤٤
ayahs.translation: On thrones facing one another.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِكَأْسٍ مِّن مَّعِينِۭ ٤٥
ayahs.translation: There will be circulated among them a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بَيْضَآءَ لَذَّةٍ لِّلشَّـٰرِبِينَ ٤٦
ayahs.translation: White and delicious to the drinkers;

ayahs.textUthmani: لَا فِيهَا غَوْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ عَنْهَا يُنزَفُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَا فِيهَا غَوْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ عَنْهَا يُنزَفُونَ ٤٧
ayahs.textIndopak: لَا فِيۡهَا غَوۡلٌ وَّلَا هُمۡ عَنۡهَا يُنۡزَفُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: No bad effect is there in it, nor from it will they be intoxicated.
ayahs.transliteration: Laa feehaa ghawlunw Wa-laa hum 'anhaa yunzafoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَعِندَهُمْ قَـٰصِرَٲتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ عِينٌ ٤٨
ayahs.translation: And with them will be women limiting [their] glances, with large, [beautiful] eyes,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَأَنَّهُنَّ بَيْضٌ مَّكْنُونٌ ٤٩
ayahs.translation: As if they were [delicate] eggs, well-protected.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ ٥٠
ayahs.translation: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other.

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ قَآئِلٌ مِّنْهُمْ إِنِّى كَانَ لِى قَرِينٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ قَآئِلٌ مِّنْهُمْ إِنِّى كَانَ لِى قَرِينٌ ٥١
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ قَآٮِٕلٌ مِّنۡهُمۡ اِنِّىۡ كَانَ لِىۡ قَرِيۡنٌۙ‏
ayahs.translation: A speaker among them will say, "Indeed, I had a companion [on earth].
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala qaaa'ilum minhum innee kaana lee qareen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَقُولُ أَءِنَّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُصَدِّقِينَ ٥٢
ayahs.translation: Who would say, 'Are you indeed of those who believe

ayahs.textUthmani: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَدِينُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَدِينُونَ ٥٣
ayahs.textIndopak: ءَاِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَّعِظَامًا ءَاِنَّا لَمَدِيۡنُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: That when we have died and become dust and bones, we will indeed be recompensed?'"
ayahs.transliteration: A-ithaa mitnaa Wa-kunnaa turaabanw Wa-'izaaman 'a-innaa lamadeenoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ هَلْ أَنتُم مُّطَّلِعُونَ ٥٤
ayahs.translation: He will say, "Would you [care to] look?"

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱطَّلَعَ فَرَءَاهُ فِى سَوَآءِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ ٥٥
ayahs.translation: And he will look and see him in the midst of the Hellfire.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ تَٱللَّهِ إِن كِدتَّ لَتُرْدِينِ ٥٦
ayahs.translation: He will say, "By Allāh, you almost ruined me.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَوْلَا نِعْمَةُ رَبِّى لَكُنتُ مِنَ ٱلْمُحْضَرِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَوْلَا نِعْمَةُ رَبِّى لَكُنتُ مِنَ ٱلْمُحْضَرِينَ ٥٧
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَوۡلَا نِعۡمَةُ رَبِّىۡ لَـكُنۡتُ مِنَ الۡمُحۡضَرِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: If not for the favor of my Lord, I would have been of those brought in [to Hell].
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-law-laa ni'matu Rabbee lakuntu minal muhdareen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَفَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَيِّتِينَ ٥٨
ayahs.translation: Then, are we not to die

ayahs.textUthmani: إِلَّا مَوْتَتَنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَّا مَوْتَتَنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ ٥٩
ayahs.textIndopak: اِلَّا مَوۡتَتَـنَا الۡاُوۡلٰى وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمُعَذَّبِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Except for our first death, and we will not be punished?"
ayahs.transliteration: Illa mawtatanal oola Wa-maa nahnu bimu'aththabeen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ ٦٠
ayahs.translation: Indeed, this is the great attainment.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لِمِثْلِ هَـٰذَا فَلْيَعْمَلِ ٱلْعَـٰمِلُونَ ٦١
ayahs.translation: For the like of this let the workers [on earth] work.

ayahs.textUthmani: أَذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ نُّزُلًا أَمْ شَجَرَةُ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَذَٲلِكَ خَيْرٌ نُّزُلاً أَمْ شَجَرَةُ ٱلزَّقُّومِ ٦٢
ayahs.textIndopak: اَذٰ لِكَ خَيۡرٌ نُّزُلًا اَمۡ شَجَرَةُ الزَّقُّوۡمِ‏
ayahs.translation: Is that [i.e., Paradise] a better accommodation or the tree of zaqqūm?
ayahs.transliteration: Athaalika khairun nuzulan am shajaratuz Zaqqoom

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَـٰهَا فِتْنَةً لِّلظَّـٰلِمِينَ ٦٣
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We have made it a torment for the wrongdoers.

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّهَا شَجَرَةٌ تَخْرُجُ فِىٓ أَصْلِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهَا شَجَرَةٌ تَخْرُجُ فِىٓ أَصْلِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ ٦٤
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّهَا شَجَرَةٌ تَخۡرُجُ فِىۡۤ اَصۡلِ الۡجَحِيۡمِۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, it is a tree issuing from the bottom of the Hellfire,
ayahs.transliteration: Innahaa shajaratun takhruju feee aslil Jaheem

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: طَلْعُهَا كَأَنَّهُۥ رُءُوسُ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينِ ٦٥
ayahs.translation: Its emerging fruit as if it was heads of the devils.

ayahs.textUthmani: فَإِنَّهُمْ لَـَٔاكِلُونَ مِنْهَا فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنْهَا ٱلْبُطُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِنَّهُمْ لَأَكِلُونَ مِنْهَا فَمَالِــُٔونَ مِنْهَا ٱلْبُطُونَ ٦٦
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاِنَّهُمۡ لَاٰكِلُوۡنَ مِنۡهَا فَمٰلِــُٔــوۡنَ مِنۡهَا الۡبُطُوۡنَ ؕ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And indeed, they will eat from it and fill with it their bellies.
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-innahum la-aakiloona minhaa famaali'oona minhal butoon

ayahs.textUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنَّ لَهُمْ عَلَيْهَا لَشَوْبًا مِّنْ حَمِيمٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ إِنَّ لَهُمْ عَلَيْهَا لَشَوْبًا مِّنْ حَمِيمٍ ٦٧
ayahs.textIndopak: ثُمَّ اِنَّ لَهُمۡ عَلَيۡهَا لَشَوۡبًا مِّنۡ حَمِيۡمٍ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Then indeed, they will have after it a mixture of scalding water.
ayahs.transliteration: Summa inna lahum 'alaihaa lashawbam min hameem

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ إِنَّ مَرْجِعَهُمْ لَإِلَى ٱلْجَحِيمِ ٦٨
ayahs.translation: Then indeed, their return will be to the Hellfire.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهُمْ أَلْفَوْاْ ءَابَآءَهُمْ ضَآلِّينَ ٦٩
ayahs.translation: Indeed they found their fathers astray.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَهُمْ عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَـٰرِهِمْ يُهْرَعُونَ ٧٠
ayahs.translation: So they hastened [to follow] in their footsteps.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ ضَلَّ قَبْلَهُمْ أَكْثَرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ ٧١
ayahs.translation: And there had already strayed before them most of the former peoples,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا فِيهِم مُّنذِرِينَ ٧٢
ayahs.translation: And We had already sent among them warners.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ ٧٣
ayahs.translation: Then look how was the end of those who were warned -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ ٧٤
ayahs.translation: But not the chosen servants of Allāh.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ نَادَٮٰنَا نُوحٌ فَلَنِعْمَ ٱلْمُجِيبُونَ ٧٥
ayahs.translation: And Noah had certainly called Us, and [We are] the best of responders.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَنَجَّيْنَـٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْكَرْبِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ ٧٦
ayahs.translation: And We saved him and his family from the great affliction.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجَعَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُۥ هُمُ ٱلْبَاقِينَ ٧٧
ayahs.translation: And We made his descendants those remaining [on the earth]

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ فِى ٱلْأَخِرِينَ ٧٨
ayahs.translation: And left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَىٰ نُوحٍ فِى ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ٧٩
ayahs.translation: "Peace upon Noah among the worlds."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّا كَذَٲلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ ٨٠
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ٨١
ayahs.translation: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ أَغْرَقْنَا ٱلْأَخَرِينَ ٨٢
ayahs.translation: Then We drowned the others [i.e., disbelievers].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ۞ وَإِنَّ مِن شِيعَتِهِۦ لَإِبْرَٲهِيمَ ٨٣
ayahs.translation: And indeed, among his kind was Abraham,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذْ جَآءَ رَبَّهُۥ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ ٨٤
ayahs.translation: When he came to his Lord with a sound heart

ayahs.textUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦ مَاذَا تَعْبُدُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦ مَاذَا تَعْبُدُونَ ٨٥
ayahs.textIndopak: اِذۡ قَالَ لِاَبِيۡهِ وَقَوۡمِهٖ مَاذَا تَعۡبُدُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: [And] when he said to his father and his people, "What do you worship?
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qaala li-abeehi Wa-qawmihee maathaa ta'budoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَئِفْكًا ءَالِهَةً دُونَ ٱللَّهِ تُرِيدُونَ ٨٦
ayahs.translation: Is it falsehood [as] gods other than Allāh you desire?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَمَا ظَنُّكُم بِرَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ٨٧
ayahs.translation: Then what is your thought about the Lord of the worlds?"

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَنَظَرَ نَظْرَةً فِى ٱلنُّجُومِ ٨٨
ayahs.translation: And he cast a look at the stars.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَقَالَ إِنِّى سَقِيمٌ ٨٩
ayahs.translation: And said, "Indeed, I am [about to be] ill."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَتَوَلَّوْاْ عَنْهُ مُدْبِرِينَ ٩٠
ayahs.translation: So they turned away from him, departing.

ayahs.textUthmani: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِهِمْ فَقَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِهِمْ فَقَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ ٩١
ayahs.textIndopak: فَرَاغَ اِلٰٓى اٰلِهَتِهِمۡ فَقَالَ اَلَا تَاۡكُلُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Then he turned to their gods and said, "Do you not eat?
ayahs.transliteration: Faraagha ilaaa aalihatihim faqaala alaa taakuloon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَا لَكُمْ لَا تَنطِقُونَ ٩٢
ayahs.translation: What is [wrong] with you that you do not speak?".

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَرَاغَ عَلَيْهِمْ ضَرْبَۢا بِٱلْيَمِينِ ٩٣
ayahs.translation: And he turned upon them a blow with [his] right hand.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَقْبَلُوٓاْ إِلَيْهِ يَزِفُّونَ ٩٤
ayahs.translation: Then they [i.e., the people] came toward him, hastening.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ أَتَعْبُدُونَ مَا تَنْحِتُونَ ٩٥
ayahs.translation: He said, "Do you worship that which you [yourselves] carve,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱللَّهُ خَلَقَكُمْ وَمَا تَعْمَلُونَ ٩٦
ayahs.translation: While Allāh created you and that which you do?"

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالُوا۟ ٱبْنُوا۟ لَهُۥ بُنْيَـٰنًا فَأَلْقُوهُ فِى ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُواْ ٱبْنُواْ لَهُۥ بُنْيَـٰنًا فَأَلْقُوهُ فِى ٱلْجَحِيمِ ٩٧
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالُوا ابۡنُوۡا لَهٗ بُنۡيَانًا فَاَلۡقُوۡهُ فِى الۡجَحِيۡمِ‏
ayahs.translation: They said, "Construct for him a structure [i.e., furnace] and throw him into the burning fire."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaalub noo lahoo bun-yaanan fa-alqoohu fil jaheem

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَرَادُواْ بِهِۦ كَيْدًا فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمُ ٱلْأَسْفَلِينَ ٩٨
ayahs.translation: And they intended for him a plan [i.e., harm], but We made them the most debased.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَقَالَ إِنِّى ذَاهِبٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَقَالَ إِنِّى ذَاهِبٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ ٩٩
ayahs.textIndopak: وَقَالَ اِنِّىۡ ذَاهِبٌ اِلٰى رَبِّىۡ سَيَهۡدِيۡنِ‏
ayahs.translation: And [then] he said, "Indeed, I will go to [where I am ordered by] my Lord; He will guide me.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-qaala innee thaahibun ilaa Rabbee sa-yahdeen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: رَبِّ هَبْ لِى مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ ١٠٠
ayahs.translation: My Lord, grant me [a child] from among the righteous."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبَشَّرْنَـٰهُ بِغُلَـٰمٍ حَلِيمٍ ١٠١

words.translation: So We gave him the glad tidings

ayahs.translation: So We gave him good tidings of a forbearing boy.

ayahs.textUthmani: فَلَمَّا بَلَغَ مَعَهُ ٱلسَّعْىَ قَالَ يَـٰبُنَىَّ إِنِّىٓ أَرَىٰ فِى ٱلْمَنَامِ أَنِّىٓ أَذْبَحُكَ فَٱنظُرْ مَاذَا تَرَىٰ ۚ قَالَ يَـٰٓأَبَتِ ٱفْعَلْ مَا تُؤْمَرُ ۖ سَتَجِدُنِىٓ إِن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰبِرِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَمَّا بَلَغَ مَعَهُ ٱلسَّعْىَ قَالَ يَـٰبُنَىَّ إِنِّىٓ أَرَىٰ فِى ٱلْمَنَامِ أَنِّىٓ أَذْبَحُكَ فَٱنظُرْ مَاذَا تَرَىٰ‌ۚ قَالَ يَـٰٓأَبَتِ ٱفْعَلْ مَا تُؤْمَرُ‌ۖ سَتَجِدُنِىٓ إِن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰبِرِينَ ١٠٢
ayahs.textIndopak: فَلَمَّا بَلَغَ مَعَهُ السَّعۡىَ قَالَ يٰبُنَىَّ اِنِّىۡۤ اَرٰى فِى الۡمَنَامِ اَنِّىۡۤ اَذۡبَحُكَ فَانْظُرۡ مَاذَا تَرٰى​ؕ قَالَ يٰۤاَبَتِ افۡعَلۡ مَا تُؤۡمَرُ​ سَتَجِدُنِىۡۤ اِنۡ شَآءَ اللّٰهُ مِنَ الصّٰبِرِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And when he reached with him [the age of] exertion, he said, "O my son, indeed I have seen in a dream that I [must] sacrifice you, so see what you think." He said, "O my father, do as you are commanded. You will find me, if Allāh wills, of the steadfast."
ayahs.transliteration: Falamma balagha ma'a-hus sa'ya qaala yaa-buniya inneee araa fil manaami anneee athbahuka fanzur maathaa taraa; qaala yaaa-abatif 'al maa tu'maru satajidunee in shaaa' allaahu minas saabireen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَمَّآ أَسْلَمَا وَتَلَّهُۥ لِلْجَبِينِ ١٠٣
ayahs.translation: And when they had both submitted and he put him down upon his forehead,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَنَـٰدَيْنَـٰهُ أَن يَـٰٓإِبْرَٲهِيمُ ١٠٤

words.translation: And We called out to him

ayahs.translation: We called to him, "O Abraham,

ayahs.textUthmani: قَدْ صَدَّقْتَ ٱلرُّءْيَآ ۚ إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَدْ صَدَّقْتَ ٱلرُّءْيَآ‌ۚ إِنَّا كَذَٲلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ ١٠٥
ayahs.textIndopak: قَدۡ صَدَّقۡتَ الرُّءۡيَا ​ ​ۚ اِنَّا كَذٰلِكَ نَجۡزِى الۡمُحۡسِنِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: You have fulfilled the vision." Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
ayahs.transliteration: Qad saddaqtar ru'yaa; innaa kathaalika najzil muhsineen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلْبَلَـٰٓؤُاْ ٱلْمُبِينُ ١٠٦
ayahs.translation: Indeed, this was the clear trial.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَفَدَيْنَـٰهُ بِذِبْحٍ عَظِيمٍ ١٠٧
ayahs.translation: And We ransomed him with a great sacrifice,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ فِى ٱلْأَخِرِينَ ١٠٨
ayahs.translation: And We left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَىٰٓ إِبْرَٲهِيمَ ١٠٩
ayahs.translation: "Peace upon Abraham."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَذَٲلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ ١١٠
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ١١١
ayahs.translation: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَبَشَّرْنَـٰهُ بِإِسْحَـٰقَ نَبِيًّا مِّنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ ١١٢

words.translation: And We gave him glad tidings

ayahs.translation: And We gave him good tidings of Isaac, a prophet from among the righteous.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَبَـٰرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰٓ إِسْحَـٰقَ ۚ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا مُحْسِنٌ وَظَالِمٌ لِّنَفْسِهِۦ مُبِينٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَبَـٰرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰٓ إِسْحَـٰقَ‌ۚ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا مُحْسِنٌ وَظَالِمٌ لِّنَفْسِهِۦ مُبِينٌ ١١٣
ayahs.textIndopak: وَبٰرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ وَعَلٰٓى اِسۡحٰقَ​ؕ وَ مِنۡ ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا مُحۡسِنٌ وَّظَالِمٌ لِّنَفۡسِهٖ مُبِيۡنٌ​‏
ayahs.translation: And We blessed him and Isaac. But among their descendants is the doer of good and the clearly unjust to himself [i.e., sinner].
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-baaraknaa 'alaihi Wa-'alaaa Ishaaq; Wa-min thurriyya-tihimaa muhsinunw Wa-zaalimul linafsihee mubeen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ مَنَنَّا عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ وَهَـٰرُونَ ١١٤
ayahs.translation: And We did certainly confer favor upon Moses and Aaron.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَنَجَّيْنَـٰهُمَا وَقَوْمَهُمَا مِنَ ٱلْكَرْبِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ ١١٥

words.translation: And We saved both of them

ayahs.translation: And We saved them and their people from the great affliction,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَنَصَرْنَـٰهُمْ فَكَانُواْ هُمُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبِينَ ١١٦
ayahs.translation: And We supported them so it was they who overcame.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُمَا ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ ٱلْمُسْتَبِينَ ١١٧

words.translation: And We gave both of them

ayahs.translation: And We gave them the explicit Scripture [i.e., the Torah],

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَهَدَيْنَـٰهُمَا ٱلصِّرَٲطَ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمَ ١١٨

words.translation: And We guided both of them

ayahs.translation: And We guided them on the straight path.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِمَا فِى ٱلْأَخِرِينَ ١١٩
ayahs.translation: And We left for them [favorable mention] among later generations:

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ وَهَـٰرُونَ ١٢٠
ayahs.translation: "Peace upon Moses and Aaron."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّا كَذَٲلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ ١٢١
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهُمَا مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ١٢٢
ayahs.translation: Indeed, they were of Our believing servants.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّ إِلْيَاسَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ ١٢٣
ayahs.translation: And indeed, Elias was from among the messengers,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذْ قَالَ لِقَوْمِهِۦٓ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ ١٢٤
ayahs.translation: When he said to his people, "Will you not fear Allāh?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَتَدْعُونَ بَعْلاً وَتَذَرُونَ أَحْسَنَ ٱلْخَـٰلِقِينَ ١٢٥
ayahs.translation: Do you call upon Baʿl and leave the best of creators -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱللَّهَ رَبَّكُمْ وَرَبَّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ ١٢٦
ayahs.translation: Allāh, your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers?"

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَإِنَّهُمْ لَمُحْضَرُونَ ١٢٧
ayahs.translation: And they denied him, so indeed, they will be brought [for punishment],

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ ١٢٨
ayahs.translation: Except the chosen servants of Allāh.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ فِى ٱلْأَخِرِينَ ١٢٩
ayahs.translation: And We left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَىٰٓ إِلْ يَاسِينَ ١٣٠
ayahs.translation: "Peace upon Elias."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّا كَذَٲلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ ١٣١
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ١٣٢
ayahs.translation: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّ لُوطًا لَّمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ ١٣٣
ayahs.translation: And indeed, Lot was among the messengers.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذْ نَجَّيْنَـٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥٓ أَجْمَعِينَ ١٣٤
ayahs.translation: [So mention] when We saved him and his family, all,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَّا عَجُوزًا فِى ٱلْغَـٰبِرِينَ ١٣٥
ayahs.translation: Except an old woman [i.e., his wife] among those who remained [with the evildoers].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ دَمَّرْنَا ٱلْأَخَرِينَ ١٣٦
ayahs.translation: Then We destroyed the others.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّكُمْ لَتَمُرُّونَ عَلَيْهِم مُّصْبِحِينَ ١٣٧
ayahs.translation: And indeed, you pass by them in the morning

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَبِٱلَّيْلِ‌ۗ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ ١٣٨
ayahs.translation: And at night. Then will you not use reason?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّ يُونُسَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ ١٣٩
ayahs.translation: And indeed, Jonah was among the messengers.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذْ أَبَقَ إِلَى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ ١٤٠
ayahs.translation: [Mention] when he ran away to the laden ship.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَسَاهَمَ فَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُدْحَضِينَ ١٤١
ayahs.translation: And he drew lots and was among the losers.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱلْتَقَمَهُ ٱلْحُوتُ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٌ ١٤٢
ayahs.translation: Then the fish swallowed him, while he was blameworthy.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَوْلَآ أَنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسَبِّحِينَ ١٤٣
ayahs.translation: And had he not been of those who exalt Allāh,

ayahs.textUthmani: لَلَبِثَ فِى بَطْنِهِۦٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَلَبِثَ فِى بَطْنِهِۦٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ ١٤٤
ayahs.textIndopak: لَلَبِثَ فِىۡ بَطۡنِهٖۤ اِلٰى يَوۡمِ يُبۡعَثُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: He would have remained inside its belly until the Day they are resurrected.
ayahs.transliteration: Lalabisa fee batniheee ilaa Yawmi yub'asoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ۞ فَنَبَذْنَـٰهُ بِٱلْعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ سَقِيمٌ ١٤٥
ayahs.translation: But We threw him onto the open shore while he was ill.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَنۢبَتْنَا عَلَيْهِ شَجَرَةً مِّن يَقْطِينٍ ١٤٦
ayahs.translation: And We caused to grow over him a gourd vine.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَأَرْسَلْنَـٰهُ إِلَىٰ مِا۟ئَةِ أَلْفٍ أَوْ يَزِيدُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَرْسَلْنَـٰهُ إِلَىٰ مِاْئَةِ أَلْفٍ أَوْ يَزِيدُونَ ١٤٧
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاَرۡسَلۡنٰهُ اِلٰى مِائَةِ اَلۡفٍ اَوۡ يَزِيۡدُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And We sent him to [his people of] a hundred thousand or more.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-arsalnaahu ilaa mi'ati alfin aw yazeedoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَـَٔـامَنُواْ فَمَتَّعْنَـٰهُمْ إِلَىٰ حِينٍ ١٤٨
ayahs.translation: And they believed, so We gave them enjoyment [of life] for a time.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱسْتَفْتِهِمْ أَلِرَبِّكَ ٱلْبَنَاتُ وَلَهُمُ ٱلْبَنُونَ ١٤٩
ayahs.translation: So inquire of them, [O Muḥammad], "Does your Lord have daughters while they have sons?

ayahs.textUthmani: أَمْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ إِنَـٰثًا وَهُمْ شَـٰهِدُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَمْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ إِنَـٰثًا وَهُمْ شَـٰهِدُونَ ١٥٠
ayahs.textIndopak: اَمۡ خَلَقۡنَا الۡمَلٰٓٮِٕكَةَ اِنَاثًا وَّهُمۡ شٰهِدُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Or did We create the angels as females while they were witnesses?"
ayahs.transliteration: Am khalaqnal malaaa'i-kata inaasanw Wa-hum shaahidoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَلَآ إِنَّهُم مِّنْ إِفْكِهِمْ لَيَقُولُونَ ١٥١
ayahs.translation: Unquestionably, it is out of their [invented] falsehood that they say,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَدَ ٱللَّهُ وَإِنَّهُمْ لَكَـٰذِبُونَ ١٥٢
ayahs.translation: "Allāh has begotten," and indeed, they are liars.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَصْطَفَى ٱلْبَنَاتِ عَلَى ٱلْبَنِينَ ١٥٣
ayahs.translation: Has He chosen daughters over sons?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَا لَكُمْ كَيْفَ تَحْكُمُونَ ١٥٤
ayahs.translation: What is [wrong] with you? How do you make judgement?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ ١٥٥
ayahs.translation: Then will you not be reminded?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَمْ لَكُمْ سُلْطَـٰنٌ مُّبِينٌ ١٥٦
ayahs.translation: Or do you have a clear authority?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأْتُواْ بِكِتَـٰبِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ ١٥٧
ayahs.translation: Then produce your scripture, if you should be truthful.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَجَعَلُوا۟ بَيْنَهُۥ وَبَيْنَ ٱلْجِنَّةِ نَسَبًا ۚ وَلَقَدْ عَلِمَتِ ٱلْجِنَّةُ إِنَّهُمْ لَمُحْضَرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجَعَلُواْ بَيْنَهُۥ وَبَيْنَ ٱلْجِنَّةِ نَسَبًا‌ۚ وَلَقَدْ عَلِمَتِ ٱلْجِنَّةُ إِنَّهُمْ لَمُحْضَرُونَ ١٥٨
ayahs.textIndopak: وَجَعَلُوۡا بَيۡنَهٗ وَبَيۡنَ الۡجِنَّةِ نَسَبًا ؕ​ وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمَتِ الۡجِنَّةُ اِنَّهُمۡ لَمُحۡضَرُوۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And they have made [i.e., claimed] between Him and the jinn a lineage, but the jinn have already known that they [who made such claims] will be brought [to punishment].
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-ja'aloo bainahoo Wa-bainal jinnati nasabaa; Wa-laqad 'alimatil jinnatu innahum lamuhdaroon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ ١٥٩
ayahs.translation: Exalted is Allāh above what they describe,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ ١٦٠
ayahs.translation: Except the chosen servants of Allāh [who do not share in that sin].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِنَّكُمْ وَمَا تَعْبُدُونَ ١٦١
ayahs.translation: So indeed, you [disbelievers] and whatever you worship,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَآ أَنتُمْ عَلَيْهِ بِفَـٰتِنِينَ ١٦٢
ayahs.translation: You cannot tempt [anyone] away from Him

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَّا مَنْ هُوَ صَالِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ ١٦٣
ayahs.translation: Except he who is to [enter and] burn in the Hellfire.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَا مِنَّآ إِلَّا لَهُۥ مَقَامٌ مَّعْلُومٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا مِنَّآ إِلَّا لَهُۥ مَقَامٌ مَّعْلُومٌ ١٦٤
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَا مِنَّاۤ اِلَّا لَهٗ مَقَامٌ مَّعۡلُوۡمٌۙ‏
ayahs.translation: [The angels say], "There is not among us any except that he has a known position.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maa minnaaa illaa lahoo maqaamun ma'loom

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّا لَنَحْنُ ٱلصَّآفُّونَ ١٦٥
ayahs.translation: And indeed, we are those who line up [for prayer].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّا لَنَحْنُ ٱلْمُسَبِّحُونَ ١٦٦
ayahs.translation: And indeed, we are those who exalt Allāh."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِن كَانُواْ لَيَقُولُونَ ١٦٧
ayahs.translation: And indeed, they [i.e., the disbelievers] used to say,

ayahs.textUthmani: لَوْ أَنَّ عِندَنَا ذِكْرًا مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَوْ أَنَّ عِندَنَا ذِكْرًا مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ ١٦٨
ayahs.textIndopak: لَوۡ اَنَّ عِنۡدَنَا ذِكۡرًا مِّنَ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: "If we had a message from [those of] the former peoples,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَكُنَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ ١٦٩
ayahs.translation: We would have been the chosen servants of Allāh."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَكَفَرُواْ بِهِۦ‌ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ ١٧٠
ayahs.translation: But they disbelieved in it, so they are going to know.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ سَبَقَتْ كَلِمَتُنَا لِعِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ ١٧١
ayahs.translation: And Our word [i.e., decree] has already preceded for Our servants, the messengers,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهُمْ لَهُمُ ٱلْمَنصُورُونَ ١٧٢
ayahs.translation: [That] indeed, they would be those given victory

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّ جُندَنَا لَهُمُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبُونَ ١٧٣
ayahs.translation: And [that] indeed, Our soldiers [i.e., the believers] will be those who overcome.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ ١٧٤
ayahs.translation: So, [O Muḥammad], leave them for a time.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَبْصِرْهُمْ فَسَوْفَ يُبْصِرُونَ ١٧٥
ayahs.translation: And see [what will befall] them, for they are going to see.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَفَبِعَذَابِنَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونَ ١٧٦
ayahs.translation: Then for Our punishment are they impatient?

ayahs.textUthmani: فَإِذَا نَزَلَ بِسَاحَتِهِمْ فَسَآءَ صَبَاحُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِذَا نَزَلَ بِسَاحَتِهِمْ فَسَآءَ صَبَاحُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ ١٧٧
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاِذَا نَزَلَ بِسَاحَتِهِمۡ فَسَآءَ صَبَاحُ الۡمُنۡذَرِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: But when it descends in their territory, then evil is the morning of those who were warned.
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-ithaa nazala bisaahatihim fasaaa'a sabaahul munthareen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ ١٧٨
ayahs.translation: And leave them for a time.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَبْصِرْ فَسَوْفَ يُبْصِرُونَ ١٧٩
ayahs.translation: And see, for they are going to see.

ayahs.textUthmani: سُبْحَـٰنَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ ٱلْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: سُبْحَـٰنَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ ٱلْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ ١٨٠
ayahs.textIndopak: سُبۡحٰنَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ الۡعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Exalted is your Lord, the Lord of might, above what they describe.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَسَلَـٰمٌ عَلَى ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ ١٨١
ayahs.translation: And peace upon the messengers.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ١٨٢
ayahs.translation: And praise to Allāh, Lord of the worlds.
